hero.subtitle: No need to cash out first — spend USDT directly by card, buy global eSIMs, and withdraw to your bank, all in compliance.

features.title: Crypto, made everyday
features.subtitle: Global spending, asset management and instant transfers — all in one app.
features.card1_desc: The U-Card works with Visa & Mastercard — tap to pay at tens of millions of merchants worldwide, ready the moment it's issued.
features.card2_desc: Stay connected in 137+ countries. Purchase with crypto, activate instantly without physical SIMs.
features.card3_desc: Book flights and hotels worldwide in one place, pay directly with crypto — ready to go anytime.
features.card4_desc: Send money as easily as sending a message. Red packets, gifts, and zero-fee P2P transfers.

cardShowcase.title: Choose your card
cardShowcase.subtitle: Physical or virtual, Visa or Mastercard — pick your network, cover every way you spend.
cardShowcase.virtual_desc: Issued and usable in one minute — bind it to overseas shopping sites and global SaaS subscriptions with ease.
cardShowcase.physical_desc: Metal-feel matte black. Withdraw at Visa ATMs and pay at POS worldwide, with no foreign transaction fees.

esim.title: Global Connectivity with eSIM
esim.subtitle: No physical cards, no roaming fees. Stay connected wherever you land.
esim.desc1: One eSIM covering every major destination — get online the moment you land.
esim.desc2: Pay with USDT and activate instantly via QR code.
esim.desc3: Flexible data packages tailored for digital nomads.

partners.title: UUPAY Referral Partner Program
partners.subtitle: Refer friends who open a card and spend, and earn up to 50% commission.

promotions.title: Limited-Time Offers
promotions.subtitle: Exclusive rewards for early adopters.
promotions.promo1_desc: Get a virtual card for only 1 USDT and receive 1 USDT cashback instantly.
promotions.promo2_desc: Enjoy zero deposit and top-up transaction fees during the promotional period.

download.title: Download UUPAY App
download.subtitle: Scan the QR code or choose your store to download the app and begin.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: UUPAY is an all-in-one crypto payment platform: Visa & Mastercard virtual and physical cards, global eSIM data plans, compliant fiat withdrawals, and chat-easy instant transfers — everything in a single app.
faq.q2: How do I open a UUPAY virtual card?
faq.a2: Sign up, complete quick KYC verification, and issue a virtual card in about 1 minute. It's ready for online shopping and global SaaS subscriptions immediately.
faq.q3: Which cryptocurrencies can I top up with?
faq.a3: UUPAY supports USDT and other major stablecoins and cryptocurrencies for card top-ups, eSIM purchases and transfers, usually settling within minutes.
faq.a4: UUPAY uses bank-grade encryption and multi-layer risk control, and settles fiat through licensed financial institutions — your funds and KYC data are protected to strict security standards.

footer.desc: Payments made simple, the world within reach. The real-world gateway for crypto.

meta.title: UUPAY - Simplify Payments, Reach the World
meta.description: UUPAY is a crypto payment platform for users worldwide. Powered by Visa / Mastercard, it lets you spend crypto by card, buy eSIMs and withdraw fiat — anywhere.

appShowcase.subtitle: Five core features at a glance. Swipe through and see how UUPAY reshapes the way you spend crypto.
appShowcase.slide1_desc: Estimated total assets, wallet & card split, USDT balance, and quick actions on one screen.
appShowcase.slide2_desc: CVV reveal, top-up, freeze, and spending limits — all in 3 seconds, virtual and physical cards.
appShowcase.slide3_desc: Send money as easily as a message. Red packets, gifts, and zero-fee P2P transfers.
appShowcase.slide4_desc: Refer and earn up to 50% commission, real-time settlement, fully transparent data.
appShowcase.slide5_desc: Account security, system settings, one-tap eSIM purchase — 128-bit encryption on every tx.

security.subtitle: Bank-grade protection on every layer — funds, data, and settlement.
security.p1_desc: AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit protect every transaction and your KYC data.
security.p2_desc: Fiat withdrawals are settled exclusively through licensed financial institutions.
security.p3_desc: Real-time monitoring, device binding and withdrawal whitelists guard your account 24/7.

lifestyle.title_html: Put crypto to work, every day
lifestyle.subtitle: From the corner café to another continent — UUPAY is your global account, right in your pocket.
